_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, including rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection, and rights related to automated decision-making and profiling.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Knowledge RC-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.681), SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.667).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.591). Shared vocabulary: [data, knowledge]. NICE-only terms [controls, privacy] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, making] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.917, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 30 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Knowledge of data privacy controls" and "Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.690 > STS 0.591 (gap +0.100). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [data, knowledge]. NICE-only: [controls, privacy]. WIDAI-only: [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, making].
